title: Love Under New Management: The Miki Howard Story
original_title: Love Under New Management: The Miki Howard Story
overview: Story of Miki Howard, an American R&B and Jazz singer, whose hits include "Ain't Nobody Like You" and "Ain't Nuthin' in the World."
